items.title: The effect of exercise on clinical pain: a systematic umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis
items.summary: An umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis synthesized evidence from 11 databases, confirming the consistent and significant analgesic effects of exercise across various pain conditions and exercise modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这是运动镇痛效应的最高级别证据。无论何种疼痛类型或运动方式，运动疗法作为一线干预的地位得到进一步巩固。在临床实践中，你应该坚定地向患者推荐运动治疗，并根据具体情况选择合适的运动方案。
items.titleZh: 运动对临床疼痛影响的系统性伞形综述和荟萃再分析
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述和荟萃再分析综合了 11 个数据库的证据，证实了运动对各种疼痛状况和运动模式均具有持续且显著的镇痛作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the highest level of evidence for exercise-induced analgesia. The role of exercise therapy as a first-line intervention is further solidified, regardless of pain type or exercise modality. In clinical practice, you should confidently recommend exercise to patients, tailoring the program to their specific condition.
items.limitation: 伞形综述的局限性在于其纳入的原始研究异质性可能较高，且效应量可能因底层研究设计而异。
items.limitationEn: Limitations of umbrella reviews include potential high heterogeneity among included primary studies and variability in effect sizes due to underlying study designs.

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials | BMC Urology
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials confirmed the efficacy of pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse, demonstrating significant improvements in prolapse symptoms and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）作为盆腔器官脱垂（POP）的一线保守治疗，其有效性在这项高质量系统综述和荟萃分析中得到再次确认。你可以坚定地向符合条件的患者推荐并指导PFMT，它是改善症状和生活质量的有效手段。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练对盆腔器官脱垂的疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析证实了盆底肌训练对盆腔器官脱垂的疗效，显示其能显著改善脱垂症状和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) is re-confirmed as an effective first-line conservative treatment for pelvic organ prolapse (POP) by this high-quality systematic review and meta-analysis. You should confidently recommend and guide PFMT for eligible patients, as it is an effective means of improving symptoms and quality of life.
items.limitation: 尽管证据级别较高，但盆底肌训练的长期依从性和不同脱垂分期的疗效差异仍需更多研究明确。
items.limitationEn: Despite high-level evidence, the long-term adherence to PFMT and its varying efficacy across different prolapse stages still require further research.

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that the demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, highlighting workforce, access, and awareness challenges.
items.curatedReason: APTA 的这份报告揭示了美国盆底物理治疗的巨大供需缺口。在执业中，这表示你所在地区的盆底 PT 服务可能需求旺盛，可考虑进一步深耕该领域，并关注相关政策动态以优化服务供给。同时，报告也强调了提高公众认知的重要性。
items.titleZh: APTA 报告指出：美国盆底物理治疗供不应求
items.summaryZh: 美国物理治疗协会（APTA）最新报告《APTA 盆底物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底物理治疗的需求远超供给，凸显了劳动力、可及性和公众认知方面的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This APTA report highlights a significant supply-demand gap in pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. In practice, this suggests strong demand for pelvic PT services in your area, and you might consider specializing further in this field, while also monitoring policy changes to optimize service delivery. The report also emphasizes the importance of increasing public awareness.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia, identifying key effective modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这项贝叶斯网络荟萃分析为卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预提供了全面的证据。你可以根据分析结果，优先选择高证据等级的干预措施，为患者制定更精准的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预措施的有效性：一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预措施的有效性，并识别出主要的有效模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian network meta-analysis provides comprehensive evidence for non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. You can use these findings to prioritize high-evidence interventions and develop more precise rehabilitation plans for your patients.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络荟萃分析的局限性在于其结果依赖于纳入研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of Bayesian network meta-analysis lies in its reliance on the quality and heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Pioneering programme launched to test breakthrough spinal treatment in UK rehab centres
items.summary: A pioneering program has launched in UK rehab centers to test the real-world impact of Onward Medical's ARC-EX system, a UK-approved spinal cord injury treatment combining targeted electrical spinal cord stimulation with rehabilitation exercises.
items.curatedReason: UK 监管机构批准的 ARC-EX 系统结合电刺激与康复训练，为脊髓损伤患者提供了新的治疗突破。你应该密切关注这类技术在临床中心的实际应用效果，这可能改变你未来对脊髓损伤患者的康复策略，并可能影响转诊建议。
items.titleZh: 英国康复中心启动创新项目，测试突破性脊髓损伤治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 英国康复中心启动一项创新项目，测试 Onward Medical 公司的 ARC-EX 系统在真实世界中的效果；该系统是英国批准的脊髓损伤治疗方案，结合了靶向电脊髓刺激和康复训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: The UK-regulated ARC-EX system, combining electrical stimulation with rehabilitation exercises, offers a new treatment breakthrough for spinal cord injury patients. You should closely monitor the real-world effectiveness of such technologies in clinical centers, as this could change your future rehabilitation strategies for SCI patients and potentially influence referral recommendations.

items.title: Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Outcomes in Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion: Study
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial found that a multimodal prehabilitation program before spinal fusion surgery in older adults was associated with a lower risk of postoperative complications and a shorter hospital stay, but the control group demonstrated better physiological function at 90-day follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 老年患者脊柱融合术前的多模式康复训练，短期内能显著减少术后并发症和缩短住院时间，是值得推行的围手术期干预策略。但在 90 天随访时，对照组患者的生理功能恢复反而更好，提示需要更长期的随访数据来综合评估。
items.titleZh: 研究发现：术前康复改善老年脊柱融合术患者的预后
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验显示，老年患者在脊柱融合术前接受多模式康复训练，可降低术后并发症风险并缩短住院时间；但 90 天随访时，对照组的生理功能恢复反而更好。
items.curatedReasonEn: Multimodal prehabilitation significantly reduces postoperative complications and hospital stay in older adults undergoing spinal fusion, making it a valuable perioperative intervention. However, control group patients showed better physiological recovery at 90-day follow-up, suggesting the need for longer-term data to comprehensively assess outcomes.
items.limitation: 虽然短期效果显著，但 90 天随访发现对照组功能恢复更佳，提示该预康复方案可能需要优化或需更长随访期评估其长期效益。
items.limitationEn: Despite significant short-term effects, the 90-day follow-up showed better functional recovery in the control group, suggesting that the prehabilitation protocol may need optimization or longer follow-up periods to assess long-term benefits.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial | Indian Journal of Orthopaedics
items.summary: A prospective randomized controlled trial found that immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures was safe and effective, promoting earlier functional recovery.
items.curatedReason: 对于无移位股骨颈骨折患者，早期负重和早期活动已被证实是安全有效的。你可以依据这一结果，在临床实践中更积极地推行早期康复方案，以促进患者功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 无移位股骨颈骨折股骨颈系统内固定术后即刻负重和早期下床活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机对照试验发现，无移位股骨颈骨折患者在股骨颈系统内固定术后立即负重并早期下床活动进行康复，是安全有效的，可促进更早的功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures, immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation have been proven safe and effective. You can confidently advocate for more aggressive early rehabilitation protocols in your clinical practice to promote patient functional recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究可能存在样本量不足以检测细微差异的风险，且其在印度人群中进行，结果外推到其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study may have an insufficient sample size to detect subtle differences, and its findings, being from an Indian population, should be generalized to other populations with caution.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, aiming to resolve conflicting findings in the literature.
items.curatedReason: 拮抗肌牵拉对主动肌表现和关节活动度的影响已得到明确。在运动前热身或训练计划中，你可以根据本综述的发现，合理安排牵拉的时机和方式，以期优化运动表现并有效预防损伤。
items.titleZh: 单一拮抗肌牵拉对主动肌表现和关节活动度的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了单一拮抗肌牵拉对主动肌表现和关节活动度的影响，旨在解决文献中相互冲突的发现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion has been clarified. In pre-exercise warm-ups or training plans, you can arrange the timing and method of stretching appropriately based on this review's findings to optimize athletic performance and effectively prevent injuries.
items.limitation: 原始研究可能在牵拉类型、强度、持续时间等方面存在异质性，影响荟萃分析的整体结论。
items.limitationEn: Original studies may have heterogeneity in stretching types, intensity, and duration, affecting the overall conclusions of the meta-analysis.

items.title: Validity and reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go and 30-second sit-to-stand via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis awaiting decompression surgery | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A study validated the reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go, and 30-second sit-to-stand tests via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis, showing strong agreement with in-person assessments.
items.curatedReason: 远程评估工具在脊柱管狭窄患者中的有效性得到了验证。这意味着你可以更灵活地使用远程医疗技术，对等待手术的腰椎管狭窄患者进行跌倒风险和功能评估，提高患者的可及性。
items.titleZh: 视频通话远程实施单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试在腰椎管狭窄症患者中的有效性和可靠性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了通过视频通话对腰椎管狭窄症患者进行单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试的有效性和可靠性，结果显示与现场评估具有高度一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The validity and reliability of remote assessment tools for lumbar spinal stenosis patients have been validated. This means you can more flexibly use telehealth technology to assess fall risk and function in patients awaiting decompression surgery for lumbar spinal stenosis, improving patient access.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量和患者特征可能限制其外推性，且远程评估可能无法捕捉所有线下评估的细节。
items.limitationEn: The sample size and patient characteristics of this study may limit its generalizability, and remote assessments may not capture all the details of in-person evaluations.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial | Bulletin of Faculty of Physical Therapy
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that pain neuroscience education significantly improved pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、残疾和生活质量均有积极影响，可考虑作为辅助干预手段。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、残疾和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验显示，疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）能显著改善冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、残疾程度和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) positively impacts pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in frozen shoulder patients; consider it as an adjunct intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心随机对照试验，结果外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center RCT, and the generalizability of its findings may be limited.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain | European Spine Journal
items.summary: A biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain, challenging commonly held assumptions about the hip–spine relationship.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，在腰痛患者中，简单的髋关节力量或柔韧性测试，可能不足以解释或预测异常的骨盆运动。诊疗时别过度强调两者之间的直接生物力学关联，应更注重全面评估。
items.titleZh: 髋脊关系生物动力学洞察：腰痛患者髋关节力量或柔韧性与异常骨盆运动无相关性
items.summaryZh: 一项生物动力学研究发现，腰痛患者的髋关节力量或柔韧性与异常骨盆运动之间没有相关性，这挑战了关于髋脊关系的普遍假设。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that simple hip strength or flexibility tests may not be sufficient to explain or predict altered pelvic motion in low back pain patients. Avoid overemphasizing a direct biomechanical link between hip function and pelvic motion during assessment, focusing instead on a comprehensive evaluation.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确立因果关系，且可能存在未测量混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality and may be subject to unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline | Journal of Orthopaedics and Traumatology
items.summary: A 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline confirmed that mattress quality significantly impacts sleep quality and can influence low back pain, morning stiffness, and shoulder discomfort.
items.curatedReason: 床垫质量对腰痛和睡眠质量有影响的观点，在本综述中得到了印证。在日常问诊中，你可以考虑询问患者的睡眠环境，并针对性地给出床垫选择建议，作为非药物干预的一部分。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响：一项 25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 一项长达 25 年的骨科文献综述指南证实，床垫质量显著影响睡眠质量，并可能与腰痛、晨僵及肩部不适有关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review confirms the impact of mattress quality on low back pain and sleep. In daily consultations, consider inquiring about patients' sleeping environments and offering targeted mattress selection advice as part of non-pharmacological interventions.
items.limitation: 作为文献综述，其结论的强度受限于所纳入原始研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a literature review, the strength of its conclusions is limited by the quality and heterogeneity of the included original studies.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: A randomized, single-blind, controlled trial demonstrated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia, showing significant improvements in swallowing function.
items.curatedReason: 这种结合 sEMG 触发的沉浸式虚拟现实游戏训练，为卒中后吞咽困难提供了新的康复方案。如果你的诊所条件允许，可以考虑引入这类技术，作为传统吞咽训练的有效补充。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练治疗卒中后吞咽困难的疗效与安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、单盲、对照试验显示，沉浸式 sEMG 触发的虚拟现实游戏训练对于卒中后吞咽困难患者具有疗效和安全性，吞咽功能得到显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training offers a novel rehabilitation approach for post-stroke dysphagia. If your clinic's resources allow, consider integrating such technology as an effective supplement to traditional dysphagia training.
items.limitation: 本研究是单盲随机对照试验，可能存在安慰剂效应或研究者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-blind randomized controlled trial, which may be subject to placebo effects or researcher bias.

items.title: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke | BMC Neurology
items.summary: A study investigated integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting 6-month motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke, demonstrating enhanced predictive accuracy beyond conventional clinical variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探索了血清神经营养因子和定量脑电图整合用于预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局的潜力。虽然仍是研究阶段，但未来这些生物标志物和影像学指标，可能有助于你更精准地预测患者的康复潜力，并优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图在预测急性缺血性卒中 6 个月运动结局方面的作用，结果显示其预测准确性优于传统临床变量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the potential of integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG to predict motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke. While still in the research phase, these biomarkers and imaging indicators may, in the future, help you more accurately predict patients' rehabilitation potential and optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，且可能存在潜在的混杂因素，其预测模型仍需大规模前瞻性验证。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, potentially subject to confounding factors, and its predictive model requires large-scale prospective validation.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A methodological scoping review examined risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field, highlighting inconsistencies in definitions and measurement approaches across studies.
items.curatedReason: 青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素仍需更一致的定义和测量方法。在当前证据下，你可以参考现有发现，为青少年运动员制定损伤预防策略和训练计划，但要注意不同研究间可能存在的差异。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项方法学范围综述考察了青少年田径运动中肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素，强调了研究中定义和测量方法的不一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field athletes still require more consistent definitions and measurement approaches. Based on current evidence, you can use existing findings to develop injury prevention strategies and training plans for young athletes, but be aware of potential inconsistencies across studies.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限性在于它主要旨在描绘现有文献，而非深入评估证据质量或进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of a scoping review is that it primarily aims to map existing literature, not to deeply assess evidence quality or conduct meta-analyses.

items.title: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears yields favorable healing rates: a systematic review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review of radial meniscus tear repairs found favorable healing rates, reporting on current surgical techniques and patient-reported outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述主要针对放射状半月板撕裂的手术修复结果。对于物理治疗师而言，了解手术干预的疗效和愈合率，有助于你更好地与外科医生沟通，并管理患者术后康复的预期。
items.titleZh: 放射状半月板撕裂的手术修复可获得良好的愈合率：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项针对放射状半月板撕裂修复的系统综述发现，其愈合率良好，并报告了当前的手术技术和患者报告结局指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review primarily focuses on surgical repair outcomes for radial meniscus tears. For physical therapists, understanding the efficacy and healing rates of surgical interventions can help you better communicate with surgeons and manage patient expectations for postoperative rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本综述关注手术治疗，对保守治疗和物理治疗的直接指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: This review focuses on surgical treatment, and its direct guidance for conservative and physical therapy is limited.

items.title: Family-Based Group Intervention Revitalizes the Psychosocial Well-Being of Adolescents with Scoliosis Receiving Brace Treatment | Child and Adolescent Social Work Journal
items.summary: A study found that a family-based group intervention revitalized the psychosocial well-being of adolescents with scoliosis receiving brace treatment, supporting non-operative modality for preventing spinal curvature progression.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究证实了以家庭为基础的团体干预能有效改善接受支具治疗的青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康。在临床实践中，你应该重视并推广这种家庭参与模式，因为它能提升治疗依从性和整体预后。
items.titleZh: 家庭团体干预改善接受支具治疗青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，家庭团体干预能改善接受支具治疗的青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康，支持非手术方式预防脊柱弯曲进展。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study confirms that family-based group interventions effectively improve the psychosocial well-being of adolescents with scoliosis undergoing brace treatment. In clinical practice, you should prioritize and promote this family-involved model, as it can enhance treatment adherence and overall prognosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，需要更严格的随机对照试验来进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This observational study may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors, requiring more rigorous randomized controlled trials for further validation.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: An observational study found a high prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunctions among female athletes, with correlations to demographics, sport profile, and physical activity levels, suggesting impact from high-impact sports.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究再次强调了女性运动员盆底功能障碍的高患病率及其与运动类型、人口学特征的相关性。在评估女性运动员时，你应该常规筛查盆底功能障碍，并针对其运动类型给出预防和干预建议。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究发现，女性运动员盆底功能障碍的患病率很高，且与人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动水平相关，提示高强度运动可能产生影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study reiterates the high prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunction (PFD) among female athletes and its correlation with sport type and demographics. When assessing female athletes, you should routinely screen for PFD and provide preventive and interventional advice tailored to their sport.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Long-Term Comparison of Patient-Reported Outcomes Following Six Surgical Procedures for Apical Suspension | International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study with 3–14 years of follow-up compared long-term patient-reported outcomes across six surgical procedures for first-time vaginal vault suspension for apical prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对盆腔器官脱垂手术长期患者报告结局的比较研究，主要是为外科医生提供手术选择的参考。对于物理治疗师而言，了解不同术式后的长期预后，有助于你更好地管理术后康复期望值。
items.titleZh: 六种盆腔顶部悬吊术式患者报告结局的长期比较
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究对首次因盆腔顶部脱垂接受六种阴道穹隆悬吊术式的患者进行了 3-14 年随访，比较了其长期患者报告结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comparative study on long-term patient-reported outcomes after pelvic organ prolapse surgery primarily guides surgeons in surgical choices. For physical therapists, understanding long-term prognoses after different surgical approaches can help you better manage postoperative rehabilitation expectations.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，存在潜在的选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This cohort study is subject to potential selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review with limited meta-analysis found that 3D-printed immobilization devices for the upper extremity yielded comparable clinical and functional outcomes to traditional methods, with potential benefits in customization and patient comfort.
items.curatedReason: 3D 打印固定装置在临床实践中越来越常见。这项综述提示，在特定情况下，3D 打印支具在临床和功能结果上可能不劣于传统固定方法，为你的固定选择提供了新的思路，特别是在需要个性化定制时。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法临床和功能结果比较：一项有限荟萃分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项包含有限荟萃分析的系统综述发现，上肢 3D 打印固定装置在临床和功能结果上与传统方法相当，并可能在定制化和患者舒适度方面带来益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: 3D-printed immobilization devices are becoming more common in clinical practice. This review suggests that in specific cases, 3D-printed splints may be non-inferior to traditional methods in terms of clinical and functional outcomes, offering a new perspective for your immobilization choices, especially when customization is needed.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析范围有限，原始研究可能存在异质性，长期效果和患者依从性仍需更多数据支持。
items.limitationEn: The meta-analysis was limited in scope, original studies might be heterogeneous, and long-term effects and patient adherence still require more data.

items.title: Online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This research explored the online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons using high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS), demonstrating its potential for non-invasive brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动的研究，为神经康复提供了潜在的新技术。虽然仍处于基础研究阶段，但你可以关注这类技术在未来临床应用中的转化潜力。
items.titleZh: 高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了使用高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动，展示了其在非侵入性脑刺激方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This research on online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) offers a potential new technology for neurorehabilitation. While still in foundational research, you can monitor the translational potential of such technologies for future clinical applications.
items.limitation: 本研究探索了方法学可行性，但临床转化前景和实际疗效仍需大规模临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: This study explored methodological feasibility, but its clinical translation and actual efficacy require validation through large-scale clinical trials.

items.title: MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease | BMC Medical Imaging
items.summary: An MRI-based study found evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease, suggesting potential links to CSF dynamics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，小头后直肌肥大可能与帕金森病（PD）的病程相关。在临床实践中，这可以作为一个潜在的生物标志物，但目前对康复干预的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者小头后直肌肥大及与病程相关性的 MRI 证据
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 MRI 的研究发现了帕金森病（PD）患者小头后直肌肥大并与病程相关，提示可能与脑脊液动力学存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy might correlate with Parkinson's disease (PD) duration. In clinical practice, this could serve as a potential biomarker, but its current guidance for rehabilitation interventions is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面观察研究，无法建立因果关系，且样本量可能不足。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional observational study, which cannot establish causality and may have an insufficient sample size.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
items.summary: This review discussed the clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics for neurorehabilitation, emphasizing its potential to enhance functional recovery and improve patient engagement.
items.curatedReason: 神经康复机器人学在提升功能恢复和患者依从性方面展现出巨大潜力。你可以关注这些前沿技术的发展，考虑未来如何将其整合到你的实践中，以期提高训练强度和康复效果。
items.titleZh: 神经康复机器人学：临床应用与未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述讨论了神经康复机器人学的临床应用与未来研究方向，强调了其在促进功能恢复和提高患者依从性方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurorobotics demonstrates significant potential in enhancing functional recovery and patient engagement. You should monitor the development of these cutting-edge technologies and consider how to integrate them into your practice in the future to improve training intensity and rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 作为综述，其内容受限于现有研究的质量和广度，缺乏新的实验数据支持。
items.limitationEn: As a review, its content is limited by the quality and breadth of existing research and lacks new experimental data support.

items.title: Rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors: a scoping review of current guideline recommendations | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: A scoping review identified current guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors, highlighting varying levels of evidence and specific intervention areas.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的指南建议。了解这些指南能帮助你更好地为这类患者制定康复计划，确保干预措施的循证性，尤其是在肿瘤治疗与康复目标之间取得平衡。
items.titleZh: 原发性脑肿瘤患者康复：当前指南建议的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的现有指南建议，强调了不同证据水平和特定干预领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors. Understanding these guidelines can help you better plan rehabilitation for these patients, ensuring evidence-based interventions, especially in balancing tumor treatment with rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限性在于其主要目的是描绘现有文献，而非深入评估证据质量或进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of a scoping review is that its primary purpose is to map existing literature, not to deeply assess evidence quality or conduct meta-analyses.

items.title: Scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players: a 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study found scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players, suggesting that dyskinesis may not always be pathological in this population.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，大部分无症状的青少年精英网球运动员存在肩胛骨运动异常，但其结构和功能保持良好。这意味着在健康运动员中，单纯的肩胛骨运动异常可能不一定需要立即干预，但仍需监测其发展，以防未来出现症状。
items.titleZh: 无症状青少年精英网球运动员肩胛骨运动异常但结构功能完整：一项 2D 视频和多模式横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项 2D 视频和多模式横断面研究发现，大部分无症状的青少年精英网球运动员存在肩胛骨运动异常，但其结构和功能保持良好，提示在这种人群中，运动异常可能并非总是病理性的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that most asymptomatic junior elite tennis players exhibit scapular dyskinesis, yet maintain preserved structure and function. This implies that isolated scapular dyskinesis in healthy athletes may not always require immediate intervention, but ongoing monitoring is warranted to prevent future symptoms.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确立因果关系，且针对的是青少年精英运动员，结果外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, which cannot establish causality, and its findings, focused on junior elite athletes, should be generalized to other populations with caution.

items.title: Electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners: a systematic review | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A systematic review explored electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners, highlighting the role of muscle coordination in running injuries and identifying key differences.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述提示，肌肉协调模式在跑步损伤中扮演关键角色。在评估和干预跑步损伤患者时，你应该超越单一肌肉力量的考量，将肌电图揭示的肌肉协调性差异纳入分析，以制定更精准的训练方案。
items.titleZh: 受伤与健康跑步者跑步时的肌电图模式：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述探讨了受伤与健康跑步者在跑步时的肌电图模式，强调了肌肉协调在跑步损伤中的作用并识别了关键差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review suggests that muscle coordination patterns play a key role in running injuries. When assessing and intervening with injured runners, you should look beyond single-muscle strength and incorporate electromyography-revealed differences in muscle coordination into your analysis to develop more precise training programs.
items.limitation: 本综述可能存在纳入研究异质性高、数据综合困难的问题。
items.limitationEn: This review might face challenges due to high heterogeneity among included studies and difficulties in data synthesis.

items.title: Stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy: a case report involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation | Child's Nervous System
items.summary: A case report detailed the stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy, involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告展示了对严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理方法。对于物理治疗师而言，了解这些复杂的神经外科干预手段，有助于你更好地参与跨学科团队的病例管理，并制定术后康复计划。
items.titleZh: 严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理：一例选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬治疗和深部脑刺激的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告详细描述了对严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理，包括选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬治疗和深部脑刺激。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report showcases a stepwise surgical management approach for spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy patients. For physical therapists, understanding these complex neurosurgical interventions can help you better participate in interdisciplinary team case management and develop postoperative rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例报告，其发现不具普遍性，仅作为临床经验的参考。
items.limitationEn: This is a case report, so its findings are not generalizable and serve only as a reference for clinical experience.

items.title: High Prevalence of Visual Defects in Children with Cerebral Palsy, Suggests Study
items.summary: A recent cross-sectional study revealed a striking 73.3% prevalence of visual defects in pediatric cerebral palsy patients, closely correlating with severe neuroimaging changes, highlighting a critical gap in early clinical detection.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强调了脑瘫儿童高患病率的视觉缺陷。作为物理治疗师，在评估脑瘫儿童时，你应该将视觉功能障碍纳入考虑，并与眼科医生紧密合作，因为视觉问题会显著影响运动康复的效果。
items.titleZh: 研究表明：脑瘫儿童视觉缺陷患病率高
items.summaryZh: 一项最新的横断面研究显示，小儿脑瘫患者的视觉缺陷患病率高达 73.3%，且与严重的神经影像学改变密切相关，凸显了早期临床检测的重大不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights the high prevalence of visual defects in children with cerebral palsy. As a physical therapist, when assessing children with cerebral palsy, you should consider visual impairments and collaborate closely with ophthalmologists, as visual problems can significantly impact motor rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students: a randomized study | BMC Medical Education
items.summary: A randomized study compared online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students, finding both methods equally effective in improving assessment accuracy and reliability.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT研究证明，线上和线下 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估（FMA-LE）培训在提升学生评估准确性和可靠性方面效果相当。这为你未来在物理治疗教育中，尤其是在资源受限或需要远程教育时，提供了采用线上培训模式的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估线上与线下培训的比较：一项随机研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机研究比较了物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估（FMA-LE）的线上与线下培训效果，发现两种方法在提高评估准确性和可靠性方面均有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrates that online and offline Fugl-Meyer Lower Extremity (FMA-LE) training are equally effective in improving students' assessment accuracy and reliability. This provides strong evidence for you to adopt online training models in future physical therapy education, especially in resource-limited or remote education settings.
items.limitation: 本研究可能存在样本量有限和短期评估的局限性，长期知识保留和实际临床应用能力仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This study may have limitations in sample size and short-term evaluation, and long-term knowledge retention and practical clinical application still require further validation.

items.title: and- see approach in a gluteal tendinopathy trial: a ...
items.summary: A qualitative follow-up study from 2021 explored the perspectives and experiences of people assigned to a 'wait-and-see' approach in a gluteal tendinopathy trial.
items.curatedReason: 这篇发表于 2021 年的研究，讨论的是一项关于臀肌肌腱病“等待观望”方法的定性随访研究，已较为陈旧。虽然定性研究提供了患者视角，但对当前临床实践的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 臀肌肌腱病试验中“等待观望”方法的患者视角和经验：一项定性随访研究
items.summaryZh: 一项 2021 年的定性随访研究探讨了臀肌肌腱病试验中被分配到“等待观望”方法的患者的观点和经验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 2021 study on a qualitative follow-up of a 'wait-and-see' approach for gluteal tendinopathy is outdated. While qualitative research offers patient perspectives, its relevance to current clinical practice is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果不具普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size and its results are not generalizable.

items.title: The NeuroWES project: lessons learned from comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders over a decade | Human Genetics
items.summary: The NeuroWES project summarized lessons learned from a decade of comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders, highlighting challenges in variant interpretation in heterogeneous cohorts.
items.curatedReason: “NeuroWES 项目”总结了十年间神经发育障碍综合表型分析和遗传分析的经验教训。对于物理治疗师而言，了解基因在神经发育障碍中的作用，有助于你更好地理解疾病的复杂性，但对直接康复干预的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: NeuroWES 项目：十年神经发育障碍综合表型和遗传分析的经验教训
items.summaryZh: NeuroWES 项目总结了十年间神经发育障碍综合表型和遗传分析的经验教训，强调了在异质性队列中解读变异体的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The NeuroWES project summarizes lessons learned from a decade of comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders. For physical therapists, understanding the role of genetics in neurodevelopmental disorders helps you better grasp disease complexity, but its direct guidance for rehabilitation interventions is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于遗传学分析和表型描述，而非直接康复干预的疗效评估。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on genetic analysis and phenotypic description, rather than directly evaluating the efficacy of rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Early Childhood Educators’ Doings to Facilitate Children’s Participation in Play: A Scoping Review and Thematic Analysis of Research Literature | International Journal of Early Childhood
items.summary: A scoping review and thematic analysis explored early childhood educators' strategies to facilitate children's participation in play, emphasizing its role in quality education and care.
items.curatedReason: 虽然这项综述聚焦早期儿童教育，但它强调了游戏对儿童发展的重要性。你可以借鉴其理念，在与有发育障碍儿童的家庭沟通时，突出游戏在促进发展和参与中的关键作用，并指导家长如何通过游戏进行康复。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童教育者促进儿童参与游戏的方法：一项研究文献的范围综述和主题分析
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和主题分析探讨了早期儿童教育者促进儿童参与游戏的方法，强调了其在优质教育和照护中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Although this review focuses on early childhood education, it highlights the importance of play for child development. You can draw upon its insights when communicating with families of children with developmental disorders, emphasizing the critical role of play in promoting development and participation, and guiding parents on how to incorporate play into rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，主要旨在描绘文献而非评估干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review primarily aims to map the literature rather than evaluate the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: A Scoping Review of Methods for Extrapolating Costs and Effects in Economic Evaluations of Remote Monitoring | PharmacoEconomics - Open
items.summary: A scoping review identified methods for extrapolating costs and effects in economic evaluations of remote monitoring, highlighting challenges due to often insufficient methodological quality and lack of long-term data.
items.curatedReason: 远程监测的经济学评估在外推成本和效果方面存在方法学挑战和数据不足的问题。你可以关注这些不足如何影响远程康复服务的经济价值判断和政策制定，但不应将当前结果视为远程医疗经济效益的最终定论。
items.titleZh: 远程监测经济学评估中成本和效果外推方法的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了远程监测经济学评估中成本和效果外推的方法，强调了方法学质量不足和长期数据缺乏所带来的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Economic evaluations of remote monitoring face methodological challenges and data limitations in extrapolating costs and effects. You should monitor how these shortcomings impact the economic valuation and policy-making for remote rehabilitation services, but do not consider current results as the final word on the economic benefits of telehealth.
items.limitation: 本研究为方法学综述，未提供具体的临床干预效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This study is a methodological review and does not provide specific clinical intervention efficacy data.

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories in stroke patients using Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility data from 700 patients, challenging the traditional average recovery patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究利用真实世界数据识别了卒中后活动能力恢复的独特模式，表明个体恢复路径差异显著。这挑战了单一的平均恢复模式观念，对你进行预后评估和制定个性化康复方案有重要参考价值。
items.titleZh: 利用常规临床数据识别卒中后活动能力恢复的独特模式
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究利用来自 700 名卒中患者的 AM-PAC 基本活动能力数据，识别了卒中后活动能力恢复的独特轨迹模式，挑战了传统的平均恢复模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study uses real-world data to identify distinct patterns of mobility recovery after stroke, indicating significant individual variability in recovery trajectories. This challenges the notion of a single average recovery pattern and provides crucial insights for your prognostication and personalized rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 该研究是回顾性队列研究，且只纳入了单一大型医疗系统的数据，可能存在选择偏倚和外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study and included data only from a single large health system, which may introduce selection bias and limit generalizability.

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance in cycling, moving beyond traditional injury incidence to provide insight into the relative severity of race incidents, including crashes and other safety-affecting occurrences.
items.curatedReason: 别再只盯着损伤率了。这个框架提示我们，评估自行车赛事风险，应将重点放在事件的整体严重程度，而不仅仅是受伤。它帮你更全面地识别和预防训练及比赛中的各种安全问题。
items.titleZh: 自行车赛事中与种族相关事件的综合严重程度评分
items.summaryZh: 一篇论文提出了一个用于自行车赛事监测的事件严重程度框架，超越了传统的损伤发生率，以深入了解包括碰撞在内的赛事事件及其对安全影响的相对严重程度。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stop fixating solely on injury rates. This framework suggests that when assessing cycling race risks, we should focus on the overall severity of incidents, not just injuries. It helps you more comprehensively identify and prevent various safety issues in training and competition.
items.limitation: 提出的框架尚未经过外部验证，需要进一步研究来评估其在不同环境下的普适性和可靠性。
items.limitationEn: The proposed framework has not yet undergone external validation, requiring further research to assess its generalizability and reliability in different contexts.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) assessed their safeguarding structures, finding that while 19/20 NOCs had safeguarding officers, most roles were combined, and gaps existed in policies, reporting, and case management.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲 20 个国家奥委会的调查显示，尽管大多数机构已设保障官员，但缺乏专职人员、政策和案例管理流程仍是普遍问题。这提示你在与国际体育组织合作或指导运动员时，要留意其内部保障机制的实际能力和差距。
items.titleZh: 准备好应对了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会（NOCs）的横断面调查评估了他们的保障结构，发现 19/20 的 NOC 设有保障官员，但大多数角色为兼职，并且在政策、报告和案例管理方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees reveals that while most have safeguarding officers, common issues include a lack of dedicated personnel, comprehensive policies, and robust case management. This suggests that when collaborating with international sports organizations or guiding athletes, you should be aware of the actual capabilities and gaps in their internal safeguarding mechanisms.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于 20 个欧洲国家奥委会，其结果可能不完全代表全球其他地区或不同规模体育组织的状况。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to 20 European National Olympic Committees, and its findings may not fully represent the situation in other global regions or sports organizations of different sizes.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD study investigated the effects of passive heat exposure and active heat acclimation on neuromuscular and musculotendinous systems, focusing on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, to understand its responses under different heat stress conditions in vivo.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究提示，在热环境下，你的运动员小腿肌肉-肌腱单元的神经肌肉和力学特性可能改变。这意味着在高温训练或比赛中，你需要更谨慎地评估跟腱负荷，并相应调整康复计划，以预防损伤或优化表现。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学位奖）
items.summaryZh: 一项博士研究探讨了被动热暴露和主动热适应对神经肌肉和肌肉肌腱系统的影响，重点关注小腿三头肌-跟腱单元，旨在了解其在不同热应激条件下的体内反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD study suggests that in hot environments, the neuromuscular and mechanical properties of your athletes' gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit may change. This implies that during high-temperature training or competition, you need to more carefully assess Achilles tendon loading and adjust rehabilitation plans accordingly to prevent injury or optimize performance.
items.limitation: 研究主要集中在小腿三头肌-跟腱单元，其发现对其他肌群或不同类型运动的外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, and its findings may have limited generalizability to other muscle groups or different types of athletic movements.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A correction has been issued for the ACTIVATE consensus study, initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy, regarding a corrected reference (reference 57) in the original publication.
items.curatedReason: 这是一则勘误，提醒你之前发布的一项关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、开具和促进体育活动共识研究，其引用文献有修正。如果你在查阅该共识时引用了该文献，请核对更新。
items.titleZh: 勘误：ACTIVATE：国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、开具和促进体育活动共识研究
items.summaryZh: 国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的 ACTIVATE 共识研究发布勘误，原文献 57 已得到修正。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a correction notice regarding a consensus study on physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals, indicating an updated reference. If you previously cited this consensus, please verify the update.

items.title: Correction: Body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals: a systematic review with meta-analysis
items.summary: A correction has been made to a systematic review and meta-analysis comparing body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals, with three studies removed due to re-examination of eligibility criteria.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项系统综述的勘误，有三项研究被移除，因为它发现这些研究仅包含激素治疗前的参与者，不符合纳排标准。即便主要结论未变，你在引用时也应知悉这是基于修正后数据集的综述。
items.titleZh: 勘误：跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项比较跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能的系统综述和荟萃分析已发布勘误，移除三项因不符合激素治疗前参与者纳入标准的原始研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a correction notice for a systematic review where three studies were removed because they only included pre-GAHT participants, not meeting the inclusion criteria. While the main conclusions remain unchanged, you should be aware that the review is now based on a revised dataset when citing it.

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction offered additional benefits over low-load exercise and comparable efficacy to high-load exercise in improving muscle strength, disability, and pain intensity in individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 对肌肉骨骼疾病患者而言，低负荷血流限制训练在肌肉力量、疼痛和功能障碍方面比常规低负荷训练有额外益处，且与高负荷训练效果相当。这意味着当患者不能承受高负荷训练时，血流限制训练是一个极佳的替代方案，你可以更有信心地将其应用于临床实践。
items.titleZh: 与常规锻炼相比，血流限制锻炼在肌肉骨骼康复中是否提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，低负荷血流限制锻炼在改善肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌肉力量、残疾和疼痛强度方面，比常规低负荷锻炼有额外益处，且与高负荷锻炼效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: For individuals with musculoskeletal conditions, low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (BFR) offers additional benefits in muscle strength, pain, and disability compared to conventional low-load exercise, and is comparable to high-load exercise. This means BFR training is an excellent alternative when patients cannot tolerate high-load training, allowing you to apply it more confidently in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 部分纳入研究的偏倚风险可能影响证据的整体确定性。
items.limitationEn: The risk of bias in some included studies may affect the overall certainty of the evidence.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions for musculoskeletal dysfunctions between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared to senior physicians in an emergency department setting.
items.curatedReason: 急诊科的物理治疗师在肌肉骨骼疾病的诊断、治疗和出院决策方面，与资深医生有一致的判断。这有力地支持了物理治疗师在急诊环境中独立或协作工作的能力，你可以此为依据推动物理治疗师在急诊科的更大参与。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍诊断和治疗的前线一致性。一项前瞻性、随机、对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照研究显示，急诊科的物理治疗师在肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断、治疗和出院决策方面，与资深医生具有高度一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapists in the emergency department demonstrate high agreement with senior physicians on diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. This strongly supports the capacity of physiotherapists to work independently or collaboratively in emergency settings; you can leverage this to advocate for greater physiotherapy involvement in emergency departments.
items.limitation: 研究仅在一个医院急诊科进行，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single hospital emergency department, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review analyzed the effectiveness of physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis, including randomized controlled trials with EDSS scores ≤6.0, but found effects remain unclear due to narrative synthesis.
items.curatedReason: 目前关于体育锻炼对多发性硬化症（MS）患者痉挛影响的证据尚不明确。虽然有一些积极迹象，但由于缺乏量化分析，你无法从中获得明确的运动处方。这提示你需要谨慎解读现有证据，并在临床实践中个性化处理，期待未来更高质量的RCT和荟萃分析。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述分析了体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的有效性，纳入EDSS评分≤6.0的随机对照试验，但由于叙述性综合，具体效果仍不明确。
items.curatedReasonEn: The evidence regarding the effect of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis (MS) remains unclear. While some positive indications exist, the lack of quantitative analysis means you cannot derive clear exercise prescriptions. This suggests you need to interpret existing evidence cautiously and individualize treatment in clinical practice, awaiting higher-quality RCTs and meta-analyses.
items.limitation: 由于纳入研究的异质性，该综述采用叙述性综合，未能进行荟萃分析以量化效应。
items.limitationEn: Due to the heterogeneity of included studies, the review used narrative synthesis and could not perform meta-analysis to quantify effects.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A validation study compared the accuracy of stride-count measurement across multiple wearable sensor configurations (ActiGraph accelerometers on wrists, hips, ankles, and pressure insoles) in 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults against a gold-standard instrumented treadmill, finding varying accuracy based on placement and algorithm.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究验证了不同可穿戴传感器配置在卒中后和健康成年人中估算步数的准确性。如果你在临床或研究中使用可穿戴设备进行活动量监测，这提供了关于传感器位置和算法选择的实证指导。
items.titleZh: 通过多重可穿戴传感器配置估算步数来量化身体活动：一项卒中后和健康成年人的验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项验证研究比较了18名卒中后和18名健康成年人使用多种可穿戴传感器配置（手腕、臀部、脚踝的ActiGraph加速计和压力鞋垫）在不同步行速度下估算步数的准确性，发现其准确性因放置位置和算法而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validated the accuracy of different wearable sensor configurations for step count estimation in post-stroke and healthy adults. If you use wearable devices for activity monitoring in clinical practice or research, this provides empirical guidance on sensor placement and algorithm selection.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且不同步行速度下的准确性可能有所差异。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small, and accuracy may vary across different walking speeds.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: This study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into three domains (functioning, wellbeing, context), suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 儿科物理治疗有了新的核心患者报告结局（PROs）和测量工具（PROMs），涵盖功能、幸福感和环境三个领域。这意味着你在日常实践、研究和质量评估中，可以使用这套标准化、以患者为中心的工具，更全面地评估干预效果和患儿的康复进展。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 这项研究开发了一套由9个患者报告结局（PROs）及其相应测量工具（PROMs）组成的儿科物理治疗核心集，分为功能、福祉和情境三个领域，适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pediatric physical therapy now has a new core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs), covering three domains: functioning, well-being, and context. This means you can use this standardized, patient-centered tool in daily practice, research, and quality assessment to more comprehensively evaluate intervention effectiveness and the child's rehabilitation progress.
items.limitation: PROMs 的具体测量特性和跨文化适用性可能需要进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: Further validation may be needed for the specific measurement properties and cross-cultural applicability of the PROMs.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis found that the implementation of the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model negatively impacted the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement in the US.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，强制性捆绑支付（CJR）模式的实施对美国下肢关节置换术前的康复（prehabilitation）服务交付产生了显著负面影响。如果你在美国执业，这提示你关注报销政策对早期康复服务的潜在限制，并可能需要调整你的实践模式或倡导政策改变。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项差异中的差异分析发现，美国实施强制性捆绑支付模式（CJR）后，提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的医院比例受到负面影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that the implementation of the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model in the US had a significant negative impact on the delivery of prehabilitation services for lower extremity joint replacement. If you practice in the US, this highlights potential restrictions on early rehabilitation services due to reimbursement policies, and you may need to adjust your practice models or advocate for policy changes.
items.limitation: 研究依赖于Medicare受益人的索赔数据，可能未能完全捕捉所有类型的康复服务或非Medicare患者的经验。
items.limitationEn: The study relied on Medicare beneficiary claims data, which may not fully capture all types of rehabilitation services or the experiences of non-Medicare patients.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: This editorial follows up on the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, examining recent advances and challenges in prevention, individualized management decisions, evolving surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论更新了 2018 年 IOC 关于儿科 ACL 损伤的共识声明，强调了预防、个体化管理和长期整体护理。作为儿科或运动物理治疗师，这指导你为年轻运动员提供更全面的 ACL 损伤管理，包括非手术路径和重返运动决策。
items.titleZh: 2018 年 IOC 儿科 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理视野
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论是2018年IOC儿科ACL损伤共识声明的后续，探讨了预防、个体化管理决策、手术策略演变以及长期整体护理方面的最新进展和挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial updates the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, emphasizing prevention, individualized management, and long-term holistic care. As a pediatric or sports physical therapist, this guides you to provide more comprehensive ACL injury management for young athletes, including non-surgical pathways and return-to-sport decisions.

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study found that multimodal integration of gait, balance, and infrared thermography enhanced machine-learning classification of knee osteoarthritis compared to single-domain models.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，整合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据能提升机器学习模型对膝骨关节炎的分类能力。这提示你，多模态评估可以更精确地诊断和鉴别膝骨关节炎，为个性化干预提供更精细的依据。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合增强了膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究发现，与单一领域模型相比，整合步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态数据能提升机器学习对膝骨关节炎的分类能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that integrating gait, balance, and infrared thermography data enhances the ability of machine learning models to classify knee osteoarthritis. This suggests that multimodal assessment can provide a more precise diagnosis and differentiation of knee osteoarthritis, offering a more refined basis for personalized interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法推断多模态整合对疾病进展或治疗效果预测的长期价值。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, so it cannot infer the long-term value of multimodal integration for predicting disease progression or treatment outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review compared upper limb rehabilitation strategies and outcomes in chronic stroke patients with and without contralateral C7 nerve transfer, identifying key evidence gaps in rehabilitation dose, content, and delivery models.
items.curatedReason: 对于接受C7神经转移术的慢性卒中患者，上肢康复的剂量、内容和交付模式仍存在显著证据空白。在评估这类患者时，你应认识到当前指南的局限性，并与外科医生及患者家属充分沟通，以制定个性化的康复方案，同时期待未来有更多针对性的研究。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：一项关于神经转移与非神经转移患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述比较了慢性卒中患者（有无对侧C7神经转移）上肢康复策略及结果，并识别出康复剂量、内容和交付模式方面的主要证据差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic stroke patients who have undergone contralateral C7 nerve transfer, there are significant evidence gaps in the dose, content, and delivery models of upper limb rehabilitation. When assessing these patients, you should recognize the limitations of current guidelines and engage in thorough discussions with surgeons and patient families to develop individualized rehabilitation plans, while awaiting more targeted future research.
items.limitation: 由于缺乏直接比较的RCT，该综述未能提供两种途径的直接优劣证据。
items.limitationEn: Due to the lack of direct comparative RCTs, this review could not provide direct evidence of superiority or inferiority between the two approaches.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A multi-method consensus process, involving a summit and Delphi process, generated recommendations for the tennis community regarding mental healthcare provision and mental wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors.
items.curatedReason: 这项多组织共识为网球运动员（包括青少年精英选手）的心理健康护理和福祉促进提供了指导。作为运动康复专业人士，你应将心理健康支持整合到你的整体康复计划中，这对于预防伤病、提升表现和促进运动员的长期健康至关重要。
items.titleZh: 网球运动中的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项通过峰会和德尔菲流程相结合的多方法共识研究，为网球社区提供了关于精英（包括青少年）网球运动员心理健康护理和福祉促进的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-organizational consensus provides guidance for mental healthcare provision and well-being promotion among tennis athletes, including junior elite players. As a sports rehabilitation professional, you should integrate mental health support into your overall rehabilitation plan, as it is crucial for injury prevention, performance enhancement, and promoting athletes' long-term well-being.

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: A trial-based economic evaluation found Pilates to be cost-effective compared to home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain in Brazil, showing similar outcomes from both healthcare and societal perspectives.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，对于慢性非特异性腰痛，普拉提在医疗和社会成本效益上与居家锻炼相当。如果你在考虑不同运动方式的推荐，这提示普拉提是个经济上可行且有效的选项。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项基于试验的经济学评估显示，在巴西，普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛在医疗和社会成本效益方面相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that Pilates is comparable to home-based exercises in terms of healthcare and societal cost-effectiveness for chronic non-specific low back pain. If you're considering recommending different exercise modalities, this suggests Pilates is an economically viable and effective option.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且仅针对巴西人群，外推至其他地区需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small and it was conducted only in Brazil, so generalizing the findings to other populations should be done cautiously.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics in 33 healthy participants, finding alterations in motor unit behavior during a sustained spinal extension task.
items.curatedReason: 急性腰痛会改变运动单元的放电模式，这提示我们疼痛可能通过影响运动控制的神经机制来限制患者功能。在评估急性腰痛患者时，请把这些神经生理学变化纳入考量，这可能有助于解释其症状和制定更针对性的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 实验性急性腰痛期间腰部运动单元行为的急性调节：一项运动单元分解分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究对33名健康受试者进行了实验性急性腰痛的运动单元分解分析，发现急性腰痛会改变持续脊柱伸展任务中的运动单元放电特性和力量稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acute low back pain alters motor unit discharge patterns, suggesting pain may limit function by impacting neuromotor control mechanisms. When assessing patients with acute low back pain, consider these neurophysiological changes, as they may help explain symptoms and guide more targeted interventions.
items.limitation: 研究通过实验诱发急性腰痛，其结果可能无法完全代表临床真实世界中的急性腰痛患者。
items.limitationEn: The study used experimentally induced acute low back pain, so the results may not fully represent patients with acute low back pain in real-world clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of eight physiotherapists treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes around facilitating wellbeing, embracing bodily experiences, and balancing emotional and ethical engagement.
items.curatedReason: 治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童，物理治疗师需要超越生物力学干预，更注重建立信任、理解儿童的身体感受，并平衡情感和伦理的投入。这提醒你，在复杂儿科病例中，全人照护和沟通技巧与技术干预同样重要。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是为有意义的生活做出贡献。” 物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了8位物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童的经验，揭示了促进福祉、接纳身体体验以及平衡情感和伦理参与等主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain requires physiotherapists to go beyond biomechanical interventions, focusing more on building trust, understanding the child's bodily experiences, and balancing emotional and ethical engagement. This reminds you that in complex pediatric cases, holistic care and communication skills are as crucial as technical interventions.
items.limitation: 定性研究的结果主要反映特定治疗师的经验，普遍适用性有限。
items.limitationEn: The findings of this qualitative study primarily reflect the experiences of specific therapists, and their generalizability is limited.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial discusses the importance of organizational leadership in athlete mental health, advocating for a proactive approach to promote well-being rather than merely responding to crises, given that up to one-third of elite athletes report mental health symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了运动组织领导层在运动员心理健康中的重要性，呼吁从被动应对危机转向主动促进福祉。作为运动物理治疗师，这提醒你在团队中倡导更全面的运动员支持系统，并将心理健康纳入康复计划。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论讨论了运动员心理健康的组织领导力，主张采取积极主动的方法促进福祉，而非仅仅应对危机，鉴于高达三分之一的精英运动员报告有心理健康症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial emphasizes the importance of organizational leadership in athlete mental health, advocating for a shift from reactive crisis response to proactive well-being promotion. As a sports physical therapist, this reminds you to advocate for a more comprehensive athlete support system within your team and to integrate mental health into rehabilitation plans.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: A protocol for an N-of-1 trial outlines an mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer, using a single-subject ABA design.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，它展示了利用 mHealth 进行老年癌症患者个性化行为干预（如促进身体活动和营养）的潜力。其 ABA 设计虽然严谨，但请记住这只是一个方案，而非干预结果。
items.titleZh: 一项基于行为改变技术的移动健康干预以促进老年癌症患者的身体活动和营养：一项 N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 一项N-of-1试验方案概述了基于行为改变技术的移动健康干预，旨在通过单受试者ABA设计，促进老年癌症患者的身体活动和营养。
items.curatedReasonEn: This N-of-1 trial protocol highlights the potential of mHealth for personalized behavioral interventions, like promoting physical activity and nutrition in older cancer patients. While the ABA design is robust, remember this is a protocol, not an outcome.
items.limitation: 这是一项试验方案，尚未产出具体结果，因此无法评估实际干预效果和局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a trial protocol and has not yet produced specific results, so the actual intervention effects and limitations cannot be assessed.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence (≥50% of prescribed sessions), highlighting factors related to early access and adherence.
items.curatedReason: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的依从率和可及性较低（38.3%）。这强调了社会经济和文化因素对康复效果的显著影响。在推广早期干预时，你必须考虑并解决家庭支持、交通、费用和观念等非临床障碍，以确保治疗能够真正惠及有需要的儿童。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆进行的横断面研究发现，94名脑瘫儿童中仅有38.3%早期（5个月前）接受物理治疗，且依从性良好（完成≥50%的规定疗程），研究揭示了影响早期可及性和依从性的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early physiotherapy access and adherence in children with cerebral palsy in Cameroon are low (38.3%). This underscores the significant impact of socioeconomic and cultural factors on rehabilitation outcomes. When promoting early intervention, you must consider and address non-clinical barriers such as family support, transportation, costs, and beliefs, to ensure treatment truly benefits children in need.
items.limitation: 这是一项在特定国家进行的研究，其发现可能不完全适用于其他地区的医疗系统和文化背景。
items.limitationEn: This study was conducted in a specific country, and its findings may not be fully applicable to healthcare systems and cultural contexts in other regions.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study developed and validated a machine learning model using perioperative clinical parameters to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery in 590 patients aged ≤75 years.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发并验证了一个预测心血管手术后运动不耐受的机器学习模型。在术后 3 个月，你可以利用出院时的临床参数进行早期风险识别，从而更早地介入康复，优化患者管理。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，该模型使用围手术期临床参数预测590名≤75岁心血管手术患者术后3个月的运动能力下降情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed and validated a machine learning model to predict exercise intolerance after cardiovascular surgery. You can use clinical parameters available at hospital discharge for early risk identification at 3 months post-op, enabling earlier rehabilitation intervention and optimizing patient management.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心回顾性队列研究，模型的外推性和普遍适用性可能需要多中心前瞻性验证。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective cohort study, and the generalizability and applicability of the model may require multi-center prospective validation.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the influence of social media on athletes' mental health, highlighting both risks and opportunities, and emphasizing the need to consider the digital environment's impact on young athletes' well-being.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响，包括风险和机遇。它提醒你，在评估和支持年轻运动员时，需考虑数字环境对其幸福感的影响，并将其纳入全面的心理社会康复策略。
items.titleZh: #Beyondthelikes：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响，突出了风险和机遇，并强调了考虑数字环境对年轻运动员福祉影响的必要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial explores the influence of social media on athletes' mental health, including both risks and opportunities. It reminds you to consider the impact of the digital environment on young athletes' well-being when assessing and supporting them, and to integrate this into a comprehensive psychosocial rehabilitation strategy.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This editorial discusses how technology can contribute to safer and smarter boxing, addressing issues like subjective judging, traumatic brain injury, and traditional training practices that rely more on intuition than data.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论讨论了拳击运动中应用技术改善健康和表现的潜力。虽然主要关注伤害管理和主观判断，但它也提醒你，即便在高度对抗性运动中，数据和技术进步也能为预防和康复提供新思路。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论讨论了技术如何帮助拳击运动变得更安全、更智能，解决了主观判罚、创伤性脑损伤以及传统训练过度依赖直觉而非数据的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the potential of technology to improve health and performance in boxing. While primarily focused on injury management and subjective judgment, it also reminds you that even in highly combative sports, data and technological advancements can offer new ideas for prevention and rehabilitation.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic highlights how video analysis of muscle strains in sport can provide insights into qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics, which are crucial for developing effective injury prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这个信息图分析了运动中肌肉拉伤的定性和定量情境特征，强调了视频分析在理解损伤机制中的作用。这可以帮助你更精确地评估运动损伤风险，并制定基于特定运动情境的预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图。运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌肉群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 这张信息图展示了运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析如何深入了解其定性和定量情境特征，这对于制定有效的损伤预防和康复策略至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic analyzes qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport, emphasizing the role of video analysis in understanding injury mechanisms. This can help you more accurately assess sports injury risks and develop prevention and rehabilitation strategies based on specific sports contexts.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aimed to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究为中重度 TBI 患者的 PTA 恢复预测提供了新视角。虽然是队列研究，但其结果可能帮助我们更好地与患者家属沟通预后，并初步指导康复策略。
items.titleZh: 创伤后遗忘症恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中重度创伤性脑损伤患者个体从创伤后遗忘症中恢复的情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study offers new insights into predicting PTA emergence in moderate to severe TBI patients. While a cohort study, its findings might help improve prognostic communication with families and offer preliminary guidance for rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究细节有限，无法评估其预测模型的具体参数和外部验证情况。
items.limitationEn: Limited study details prevent assessment of specific parameters and external validation of its prognostic model.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 care partners regarding mouthcare activities at home, identifying motor and non-motor barriers such as reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy.
items.curatedReason: 帕金森病患者在家进行口腔护理面临运动和非运动障碍，如精细动作受限、疲劳和冷漠。在制定康复计划时，除了关注步态和平衡，你还需要考虑这些日常自理活动中的隐形挑战，并可能需要跨专业转诊以提升患者的整体生活质量。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终会制造更多问题”：一项关于帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴家庭口腔护理的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了13名帕金森病患者及其7名照护伙伴在家进行口腔护理的经历，发现了包括灵活性下降、疲劳和冷漠等运动及非运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: People with Parkinson's face motor and non-motor barriers to home mouthcare, including reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy. When developing rehabilitation plans, in addition to gait and balance, you need to consider these hidden challenges in daily self-care activities and may require interprofessional referrals to improve overall patient quality of life.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍适用性有限，主要反映特定受访者的主观体验。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative research findings is limited, primarily reflecting the subjective experiences of specific interviewees.

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 140 TIA and mild stroke participants found no significant difference in functional exercise capacity, physical activity, anthropometrics, blood pressure, or quality-of-life over 6 months between integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation and usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，针对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的综合心血管康复，在 6 个月内未能显示优于常规护理的额外益处。这意味着你不应期望其超越常规护理的干预效果，而是继续评估个体需求。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 140 名短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的随机对照试验发现，为期 6 个月的综合心血管康复在功能运动能力、身体活动、人体测量学、血压或生活质量方面未显示优于常规护理的显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation for TIA and mild stroke patients did not show additional benefits over usual care within 6 months. This means you should not expect it to surpass the effects of usual care, and should continue to assess individual needs.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是综合心血管康复方案的整体效果，未细致探究方案中各组成部分的单独贡献。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on the overall effectiveness of an integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation program, not the individual contributions of its components.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying associated moderators.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员中饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率，并识别了相关调节因素。这提示你在评估和管理运动员时，需要警惕这些心理健康问题，将其纳入全面的康复和表现优化计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了不同训练水平和评估方法下运动员饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率，并识别了相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights that the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes should not be overlooked. When assessing and managing athletes, you need to actively screen for these mental health issues and integrate them into comprehensive rehabilitation and performance optimization plans to safeguard athletes' long-term health.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析结果的异质性可能较高，且部分研究依赖自我报告评估，可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Meta-analysis results may have high heterogeneity, and some studies relying on self-reported assessments may introduce bias.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients in South Korea derived subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale to predict independent walking at discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项涵盖 565 名韩国卒中患者的多中心研究，为 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）预测出院时独立行走能力，提供了亚型特异性（缺血性/出血性）的最佳临界值。这对你的临床决策非常有用，让你能更早、更准确地预判患者的步行康复潜力，从而优化康复目标。
items.titleZh: 亚型特异性 Berg 平衡量表最佳临界值预测住院卒中康复患者的独立行走能力：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对韩国 565 名卒中患者的多中心回顾性队列研究，推导了 Berg 平衡量表的亚型特异性最佳临界值，以预测其出院时的独立行走能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter study of 565 stroke patients in South Korea provides subtype-specific (ischemic/hemorrhagic) optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) to predict independent walking ability at discharge. This is highly useful for your clinical decision-making, allowing you to predict patients' walking rehabilitation potential earlier and more accurately, thereby optimizing rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集不完整或偏倚，且研究人群仅限于韩国住院康复患者，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective cohort design may have incomplete or biased data collection, and the study population is limited to Korean inpatient rehabilitation patients, limiting generalizability.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A systematic qualitative evidence synthesis of 22 studies (645 informants) identified two overarching domains of psychosocial impacts—psychological and social—related to eating and drinking difficulties after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性证据合成揭示了卒中后吞咽障碍对患者、照顾者和医疗专业人员的社会心理影响。这提醒你，康复不仅要关注生理功能，更要关注吞咽障碍带来的情感困扰和社会隔离，提供更全面的支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后饮食困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据合成
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 22 项研究（645 名受访者）的系统定性证据合成，识别出卒中后饮食困难带来的两大社会心理影响领域：心理和社会影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative evidence synthesis reveals the psychosocial impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke on patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals. This reminds you that rehabilitation must address not only physiological function but also the emotional distress and social isolation caused by dysphagia, providing more comprehensive support.
items.limitation: 定性研究侧重于经验而非量化效果，其发现基于个人叙述和解释，不提供干预有效性的统计证据。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative research focuses on experiences rather than quantitative effects, and findings are based on personal narratives and interpretations, not statistical evidence of intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study of 333 adult patients undergoing elective ACDF found that sarcopenia increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of index surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究指出，肌少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。这对你识别高风险患者、提供术前术后营养及康复建议具有重要意义，提醒你关注肌少症的预后影响。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 333 名择期进行颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术成人患者的回顾性队列研究发现，肌少症增加了初次手术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study indicates that sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). This is crucial for identifying high-risk patients and providing pre- and post-operative nutritional and rehabilitation advice, reminding you to consider the prognostic impact of sarcopenia.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且仅观察 3 年随访期，对长期影响尚需更多证据。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective cohort design may have confounders and selection bias, and the 3-year follow-up period may not capture long-term effects.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A pragmatic quasi-experimental study evaluated the effectiveness of a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) on physical, psychological, and social outcomes in 72 institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia in Taiwan.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究显示，12 周的体感游戏干预（Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure）对机构养老的老年肌少症患者具有多领域益处，包括身体、心理和社会结果。这为你将体感游戏纳入老年康复方案提供了有力证据，尤其是在改善依从性和动机方面。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结果
items.summaryZh: 一项务实的准实验研究评估了为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（任天堂 Switch 健身环大冒险）对台湾 72 名机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结果的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This quasi-experimental study demonstrates that a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) offers multi-domain benefits for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia, including physical, psychological, and social outcomes. This provides strong evidence for integrating exergaming into geriatric rehabilitation, especially for improving adherence and motivation.
items.limitation: 准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在难以控制的混杂因素，且研究人群为机构养老的老年人，结果外推性有限。
